name: Low Fat Three-Bean and Wild-Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounces lowfat cream of mushroom soup
15 1/4 ounces cooked red kidney beans, approximately
recipeInstructions:
1. About 1 3/4 hours before serving, heat margarine in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat. Cook carrots, onion, and mushrooms until vegetables are golden brown.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat cream of mushroom soup and water to boiling over medium heat.
3. In a deep 2-1/2 quart casserole, stir together the cooked carrot mixture, hot soup mixture, and wild rice.
4. Cover and bake at 400 degrees for 1 hour.
5. Rinse and drain kidney beans and great northern beans. Stir in the drained beans, pinto beans, and black pepper.
6. Cover and bake for an additional 20 minutes or until heated through. Serve warm. Yields 9 servings.
[per Serving: 1 Cup Calories: 260 Fat: 2 grams]
